_note: FAIL HIGH cascade retrofit of standalone uk-external-landscape-elv-lighting. Adds a 230V LV socket inside the elv_barrier_zone of elv_bollard_1. compliant=false; 1 critical non_compliance_flag per §715. INV-07 PASS; INV-08 + INV-10 FAIL. D-5 + D-1 reviewer flags carry forward.

_special_locations_cascade_source.consumer_invariant_signalled: INV-12 (zone exclusion — FAIL HIGH expected; §715 ELV/LV separation)

anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Path bollard 1 extracted from landscape architect Rev-A garden lighting layout dated 2026-05-26; 1000mm tall stainless cylindrical bollard, IP65 SELV LED luminaire, 12V feed.
Path bollard 2 extracted from landscape architect Rev-A garden lighting layout dated 2026-05-26; 4m east of bollard_1 along the main east-west path; same SELV 12V feed.
Path bollard 3 extracted from landscape architect Rev-A garden lighting layout dated 2026-05-26; 4m east of bollard_2 along the main east-west path; same SELV 12V feed.
Bollard 4 added by lighting engineer at first review (north terrace edge) to balance the photometric pattern; not on architect Rev-A; engineer-manual-entry provenance honest-disclosed for INV-09.
Bollard 5 added by lighting engineer at first review (north terrace edge) symmetric to bollard 4; engineer-manual-entry provenance honest-disclosed for INV-09.

Bollard 6 inferred at the east-feature-tree position based on landscape typology (illuminated feature tree); position assumed at the tree centroid from arboricultural survey; weakest provenance tier — engineer-of-record to verify final position.
